headline: From Avocado Oil to YumYum: Hidden Valley® Ranch Answers Modern Consumer Cravings with Three New Flavors
summary: Responding to a new generation of home cooks who crave both diverse ingredients and bold flavors, Hidden Valley® Ranch today announced the launch of three new product innovations including Hidden Valley Ranch with Avocado Oil, restaurant-inspired YumYum Ranch and Parmesan Ranch Seasoning.

headline: Clorox Closes GOJO Acquisition, Strengthens Position in Hygiene Solutions
summary: The Clorox Company (NYSE:CLX) is included among the 15 Best Consistent Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On April 1, The Clorox Company (NYSE:CLX) announced that it had completed its previously announced acquisition of GOJO Industries. The deal adds the Purell brand and GOJO’s health and hygiene solutions to Clorox’s portfolio. The company said the […]
